description: The ``User Joined`` node is an event that fires when a user joins the current world this node is in, as well as providing that user.

fields.OnlyHost: Should this impulse only run on the host. (Default: true) Will run an impulse for all users when set to false.
fields.OnJoined: Fires when a user joins the world.
fields.JoinedUser: The User that joined the world.
